title: Photoreal mathematical 3D surface (sinc + azimuthal ridge)
purpose: Render a glossy bronze height field for z = sin(r)/max(r,0.3) * (0.45 + 0.55*cos(4*atan2(y,x))) * 2.8 to explain radial damping, singularity protection, and azimuthal modulation in a photo-real surface.
generator: scripts/gen_math_surface.py (writes OctaneMCP_staging/math_surface.obj, ~40k verts / 79k tris, single usemtl group)
preview_note: octane-preview.png is a REAL Octane X render (ultra tier, 1280×1280, ~326 KB). preview.png is a downscaled copy for docs.
native_render_note: MTL Kd is ignored on import — the glossy bronze material is assigned explicitly via assign_material. The GPU maxRenderTime film pin is ignored on this Octane build; the effective convergence cap is the Lua wait_for_render_ready wall-clock timeout_seconds (resolved from quality tiers).
quality_checklist: Preview is non-blank and the central idea is recognizable at thumbnail size.
Scene imports the local scene.obj path listed in commands[].
Camera frames the entire subject with margin.
Materials named in OBJ usemtl statements are documented in scene.mtl and scene.json.
If native Octane output differs from preview.png, record the lesson in docs/recipe-book.md.

verification.real_surface_signature: brightness min ~60, max ~765, warm pixels (255,235,179) present

review_focus: task-specific smoothness/continuity of the height field
required_evidence: bridge result metadata for queued commands
native Octane candidate preview at octane-preview.png
glm-ocr reference and candidate review notes
one bounded patch plan per iteration
final native Octane render bundled as octane-preview.png
stop_conditions: candidate surface structure matches the reference or stated recipe intent
task-critical materials (bronze glossy) are visually distinguishable
camera/framing and lighting are close enough for the task
remaining gaps require bridge schema or native material capability work

baseline_sweep.purpose: Rapidly disambiguate scene orientation/camera framing before fine visual matching.

final_bundle.result_metadata_pattern: workspace/results/<command_id>.json copied or summarized into iterations/
final_bundle.note: The final iterated native Octane render and all reproduction assets should be checked in with this recipe before marking native_octane_verified true.
